Class ModelForum

java.lang.Object
guiForum.ModelForum
public class ModelForum extends Object
Provides the in-memory model logic for the forum feature.

This class manages forum posts and replies, validates user actions, supports soft deletion of posts, and provides filtering and retrieval operations for the forum user interface.

    Description
    ModelForum()
    The class constructor but it will not be used in this project

  • Constructor Details

    • ModelForum

      public ModelForum()
      The class constructor but it will not be used in this project

  • Method Details

    • addPost

      public static String addPost(String title, String content, String author)
      Adds a new post to the forum after validating its title, content, and author.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the post
      content - the body content of the post
      author - the username of the author creating the post
      Returns:
      an empty string if the post is added successfully; otherwise, an error message

    • addPost

      public static String addPost(String thread, String title, String content, String author)
      Adds a new post to the forum after validating its thread, title, content, and author.
      Parameters:
      thread - is post's thread
      title - the title of the post
      content - the body content of the post
      author - the username of the author creating the post
      Returns:
      an empty string if the post is added successfully; otherwise, an error message

    • getPostList

      public static List<CRUD.Post> getPostList()
      Returns the complete list of forum posts.
      Returns:
      the list of posts currently stored in the forum

    • deletePost

      public static String deletePost(int id, String author)
      Soft deletes a post if it exists and the requesting user is its author.

      Soft deletion preserves the post in the store but replaces its visible fields with "[DELETED]" and marks it as deleted.

      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the post to delete
      author - the username of the user attempting to delete the post
      Returns:
      an empty string if the post is deleted successfully; otherwise, an error message

    • editPost

      public static String editPost(int id, String author, String title, String content)
      Edits an existing post if it exists, has not been deleted, and the requesting user is its author.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the post to edit
      author - the username of the user attempting to edit the post
      title - the new title for the post
      content - the new content for the post
      Returns:
      an empty string if the edit succeeds; otherwise, an error message

    • editPost

      public static String editPost(int id, String thread, String author, String title, String content)

      Update existed post with new thread, title, and content (cannot update author)

      Parameters:
      id - is an integer that represents post's id
      thread - is a String that represents name of new thread
      author - is a String that represents post's author (unused)
      title - is a String that represents new title
      content - is a String that represents new content
      Returns:
      a String - error message, empty string if there is no error

    • addReply

      public static String addReply(String content, String author, int parentId)
      Adds a reply to an existing post after validating the reply content.

      Replies cannot be added to deleted posts.

      Parameters:
      content - the content of the reply
      author - the username of the reply author
      parentId - the ID of the parent post receiving the reply
      Returns:
      an empty string if the reply is added successfully; otherwise, an error message

    • deleteReply

      public static String deleteReply(int id, String author)
      Deletes an existing reply if it exists and the requesting user is its author.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the reply to delete
      author - the username of the user attempting to delete the reply
      Returns:
      an empty string if the reply is deleted successfully; otherwise, an error message

    • editReply

      public static String editReply(int id, String author, String content)
      Edits an existing reply if it exists and the requesting user is its author.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the reply to edit
      author - the username of the user attempting to edit the reply
      content - the new content of the reply
      Returns:
      an empty string if the reply is edited successfully; otherwise, an error message

    • getRepliesByPostId

      public static List<CRUD.Reply> getRepliesByPostId(int id)
      Returns all replies associated with a given post.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the post whose replies should be retrieved
      Returns:
      a list of replies associated with the specified post

    • filterPosts

      public static List<CRUD.Post> filterPosts(String keyword, String thread)
      Filters the list of posts using the provided keyword.
      Parameters:
      keyword - the keyword used to filter posts
      thread - is the thread name used to filter posts
      Returns:
      the filtered list of matching posts

    • clearPostFilter

      public static void clearPostFilter()
      Clears the current post filter so that all posts are included again.

    • getFilteredPostList

      public static List<CRUD.Post> getFilteredPostList()
      Returns the current filtered post list.
      Returns:
      the filtered subset of posts

    • addThread

      public static String addThread(String name)

      Create new thread in the database

      Parameters:
      name - is a String that represents a new name of thread
      Returns:
      a String that represents the error message, if there is no error, the return string is empty

    • getAllThreads

      public static ArrayList<String> getAllThreads()

      Reads all threads in the database

      Returns:
      a String list that contains all thread's name in the database

    • getPostStore

      public static CRUD.PostStore getPostStore()

      Gets the database storing all posts, used for testing

      Returns:
      PostStore object is the object storing all posts

    • getReplyStore

      public static CRUD.ReplyStore getReplyStore()

      Gets the database storing all replies, used for testing

      Returns:
      ReplyStore object is the object storing all replies

    • getThreadStore

      public static entityClasses.ThreadStore getThreadStore()

      Gets the database storing all threads, used for testing

      Returns:
      ThreadStore object is the object storing all threads

    • hardReset

      public static void hardReset()

      Danger: clears all posts, replies, and threads in the database, used only be used when testing

    • setUpDefaultForum

      public static void setUpDefaultForum()

      Reset to the default state of the forum

    • getUnreads

      public static List<CRUD.Post> getUnreads(String user)
      Return a list of unread posts given the username
      Parameters:
      user - a string contain the username
      Returns:
      an ArrayList class of Post class

    • markAsReadAllRepies

      public static void markAsReadAllRepies(int postId)
      Mark all the reply belong to a post as read
      Parameters:
      postId - the post id
